log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Plasmoid — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Plasmoid — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Plasmoid — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Plasmoid — Bardic Musician HP: 43/67
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Plasmoid — Bardic Musician HP: 23/67
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Plasmoid — Bardic Musician HP: 6/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Plasmoid — Bardic Musician --- HP: 6/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (6/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Plasmoid — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Plasmoid — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Plasmoid — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Plasmoid — Bardic Musician HP: -15/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══

--- Plasmoid — Bardic Musician --- HP: 33/67 | AC: 14
